About Hotel Cosmopolitan

A premier 4-star hotel located in the heart of Ahmedabad's Navrangpura district, offering luxurious rooms, fine dining and exceptional service for both leisure and corporate travellers.

Plan your stay

Tell us about your visit and our team will reach out to confirm availability and rates.

Address: Darshan Society Road, Near Stadium Circle, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad — 380009
Phone: +91-9099914802, +91-9099914811
Email: reserve@hotelcosmopolitan.in
